description: This image is a screenshot of the "Add Ingestion" user interface, depicting "Step 2: 'Dataset Selection Upload Dataset - Raster'" of a data ingestion process. "Continuous values" is selected as the input type. The interface allows users to specify "Excluded Value" Class Codes, with "254" and "255" currently entered. A description explains that these values, representing non-thematic data, will be counted as NoData in the ingestion. A text field is available for entering a "Layer Name". Users can upload supporting documents by "Drag and Drop" or using an "UPLOAD DOCUMENT/S" button. Two files are listed as uploaded: "Barcoding3.1.2_Impervious_Degree_v0.3.xlsx" and "IMD_2018_010m_eu_03035_v020.xml". A checkbox for "Delete raw data" is displayed and is unchecked.
